privileged_info_summary: The task verifies conversion of manually-started Docker containers to systemd services. Pass threshold is 65 out of 100 points. Scoring criteria: unit file creation (36 pts), service dependencies (16 pts), docker.service dependency (5 pts), enabled state (10 pts), active state (15 pts), restart policy (5 pts), database connectivity (5 pts), frontend accessibility (8 pts). The system uses three Docker containers (acme-db running postgres:14, acme-api running a Python 3.11 Flask app on port 5000, and acme-frontend running nginx:1.24-alpine on port 8080) connected via an acme-net Docker network. Database credentials: user 'acmeuser', password 'secretpass', database 'acmedb'. The admin user for task execution is 'ga'. All data is synthetically generated by the setup script.
